summary: STE close on Jan 5 was 256.75, up 2.68% from Jan 2's 250.04. Question asks if Jan 15 close > Jan 6 close over ~7 trading days. Monte Carlo with recent vol gives ~50% probability.
content:
STE (STERIS plc) stock analysis for Jan 6-15, 2026 price comparison:
- Recent downtrend from ~268 (late Nov) to 250 (Jan 2)
- Strong bounce on Jan 5: +2.68% to 256.75
- Full period daily mean return: ~0% with 1.13% daily volatility
- Monte Carlo (100k sims, 7 days): 49.8% probability of positive return
- Normal distribution model: 50.3% probability
- General S&P 500 base rate: 52-53% for 7-day positive return
- The mild downtrend over the past month slightly weighs against, but the recent bounce could indicate recovery
- This is essentially a coin-flip question
